channel.title: Robotics on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Robotics on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Robot Camera Dog Review
item.description:
Introduction to the Mondo Robotics Beni  

The world of robotics has seen significant advancements in recent years, with the development of innovative devices that can perform a variety of tasks. One such device is the Mondo Robotics Beni, a two-legged robot camera dog that has been making waves in the tech community. In this article, we will take a closer look at the Mondo Robotics Beni, its features, and what makes it an exciting addition to the world of robotics.

item.title: Pool Cleaning Robots
item.description:
Introduction to Pool Cleaning Robots  

Pool cleaning robots have revolutionized the way we maintain our swimming pools. These innovative devices have made it possible to keep our pools clean and hygienic with minimal effort and maximum efficiency. As a pool owner, you understand the importance of regular cleaning to prevent the buildup of dirt, debris, and algae. Manual cleaning methods can be time-consuming and labor-intensive, which is where pool cleaning robots come in. In this article, we will delve into the world of pool cleaning robots, exploring their features, benefits, and the best models available in the market.

item.title: Halo Braid Revolution
item.description:
Introduction to Hair Braiding and the Problem it Presents  

Hair braiding is an ancient art form that has been a staple in many cultures, particularly in the African and African American communities. The process of braiding hair is not only a means of styling but also a way of expressing one’s cultural identity and heritage. However, the traditional method of braiding can be time-consuming and labor-intensive, often requiring several hours to complete. This has led to the emergence of a new problem - the need for a more efficient and automated solution for hair braiding.

item.title: Roomba Revolution
item.description:
Introduction to Roomba and its History  

The Roomba, a robot vacuum cleaner, has been a household name for many years. Its introduction to the market marked the beginning of a new era in home cleaning technology. In this article, we will delve into the history of Roomba, its evolution, and its impact on the robotics industry.

item.title: Kyber: The Secret Tech Powering Millions of Future Robots
item.description:
The Man Behind VLC Is Now Building the Backbone of Physical AI  

Jean-Baptiste Kempf is a name that may not ring a bell for the average internet user, but his work has touched nearly every person on the planet. As the lead developer of VLC Media Player, Kempf helped create one of the most ubiquitous pieces of open-source software in history, with over 6 billion downloads to date. Now, he’s turning his attention to a challenge that could be even more transformative: building the infrastructure that will power millions of robots and drones in the real world.

item.title: Robotaxi Recall
item.description:
Introduction to Autonomous Vehicles  

The world of autonomous vehicles has been rapidly evolving over the past decade, with numerous companies investing heavily in the development of self-driving cars. One of the pioneers in this field is Waymo, a subsidiary of Alphabet Inc., which has been testing its autonomous vehicles on public roads since 2009. However, the latest recall of 3,871 vehicles by Waymo has raised concerns over the safety of these robotaxis, particularly when it comes to navigating construction zones.

item.title: Prime Day Robot Vacuum Deals You Can't Miss
item.description:
Introduction  

The robot vacuum market has matured dramatically over the past five years, moving from novelty gadgets to sophisticated cleaning platforms that can map homes, avoid obstacles, and even integrate with voice assistants. As Prime Day looms next week, retailers are slashing prices on flagship models from Roborock, iRobot, Eufy, and Shark. If you’ve been waiting for a sign to upgrade your floor‑care routine, now is that moment. This article dissects the most compelling early‑bird offers, equips you with the technical know‑how to pick the right device, and arms you with strategies to maximize savings without sacrificing performance.

item.title: Robotaxis Invade Closed Highways: A Tech Disaster?
item.description:
The Incident: When Robotaxis Ignored Road Closures  

In a startling revelation, Waymo—Alphabet’s autonomous vehicle subsidiary—disclosed that its robotaxis entered highway sections closed for construction at least 13 times. This isn’t just a minor glitch; it’s a systemic failure with serious implications for public safety, regulatory trust, and the future of self-driving technology.

What Happened?  

Waymo’s 5th-generation robotaxis, equipped with advanced LiDAR, radar, and AI-driven decision-making systems, repeatedly drove into active construction zones despite clear signage, barriers, and even human flaggers. The incidents occurred between May 2023 and March 2024, spanning multiple states, including California and Arizona—key testing grounds for autonomous vehicles (AVs).
